steps.title: Identify the student's claim
steps.content: The student asserts that the diverse creations by others (music, comics, architecture, furniture) are reflective of Braschi's own approach to literature. The correct quotation must directly connect her cross-genre method to the inspiration it gives others.

steps.title: Eliminate and match
steps.content:
• Choice A — '"Braschi is the focus of a 2020 collection of essays in which fifteen scholars from seven different countries delved into the linguistic and structural patterns of her writings."': Describes scholarly analysis of her writing patterns. Does not show how her approach inspires others' diverse creative work. ✗
  • Choice B — '"Braschi's eagerness to push boundaries and blend genres within literature invites us to consider how other art forms might also engage with literature."': Directly links her boundary-pushing, genre-blending approach to inspiring engagement from other art forms — exactly the claim. ✓
  • Choice C — '"Before settling in New York City...Braschi studied both literature and philosophy in several cities around the world."': Covers her educational background. Completely irrelevant to the claim about her approach inspiring others. ✗
  • Choice D — '"Braschi has produced academic pieces analyzing writings by Miguel de Cervantes, Federico García Lorca, and other authors."': Describes her academic criticism work. Has no bearing on how her creative cross-genre approach inspires diverse responses. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
